## Verification

<!-- List exact commands and results. -->

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_repository.py`
- [ ] Applicable implementation tests pass.

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] No credentials, personal Codex data, private fixtures, or hosting secrets are included.
- [ ] Local-directory access remains explicit and does not expand silently.
- [ ] Destructive filesystem, Git, integration, and deployment actions remain confirmation-gated.
- [ ] Official Codex/OpenAI and third-party identifiers were not renamed or fabricated.
- [ ] Security, privacy, accessibility, and compatibility effects are documented.
- [ ] README, roadmap, changelog, and user documentation are updated when applicable.
